heading: Cost Calculator Help Guide
steps: Select the clouds you want to compare costs by clicking on respective cloud tiles.
Select your vCPU and RAM ranges using the slider provided.
Enter your storage requirement in the text box provided.
Choose the commitment/term from the drop down provided.
You can see the results matching your search criteria for each cloud in seperate boxes.
Choose one flavor from each cloud and click on add.
You can see the aggregated results in the table below.
Repeat the process until your whole infra structure demand is completed.
There is a reset button provided to reset your whole search activity.
